commentary_text: oh dear - that is a huge wide! Even a leg slip might not have gotten to that. Full and a mile down leg. Shapes away further and ends up in a different postcode to the keeper!
header: Archer to B Sai Sudharsan, 5 wide

commentary_text: full outside off. Sudharsan gets a half stride in and pokes it towards extra cover
header: Archer to B Sai Sudharsan, no run

commentary_text: Archer to B Sai Sudharsan, SIX runswhat a shot that is! Banged in short on middle and leg. Sudharsan arches his back, opens his bat face and guides it just over deep third!
header: Archer to B Sai Sudharsan,  SIX runs

commentary_text: back of a length just outside off. Moves away and Sudharsan gets squared up as he drops it into the off side
header: Archer to B Sai Sudharsan, no run

commentary_text: full outside off. Sudharsan presses forward and pushes it to mid off
header: Archer to B Sai Sudharsan, no run

commentary_text: back of a length outside off and this whistles through. Sudharsan has a nibble at it and is beaten for pace
header: Archer to B Sai Sudharsan, no run

commentary_text: full, wide and put away! Sudharsan gets his hands through the ball nicely and cracks it between extra cover and cover point!
header: Archer to B Sai Sudharsan, FOUR runs

commentary_text: Burger to Kushagra, 1 runback of a length just outside off. Kushagra drops it into the off side and saunters across to the other end
header: Burger to Kushagra,  1 run

commentary_text: another wild delivery. Short and way outside off. Jurel does well to get to this
header: Burger to B Sai Sudharsan, 1 wide

commentary_text: edged and four! Back of a length in the channel and this nips away against the angle. Sudharsan is turned inside-out and the ball flies off the outside edge past slip!
header: Burger to B Sai Sudharsan, FOUR runs

commentary_text: length outside off. Sudharsan takes a step down the track and taps it towards point
header: Burger to B Sai Sudharsan, no run

commentary_text: Burger to B Sai Sudharsan, 1 runlength ball outside off. Sudharsan throws his hands at it and slices it down to deep third
header: Burger to B Sai Sudharsan,  1 run

commentary_text: length ball on middle and off. Kushagra presses half forward and blocks
header: Burger to Kushagra, no run

commentary_text: back of a length on middle and off. Kushagra lets the ball come to him before meeting it right under his eyes
header: Burger to Kushagra, no run

commentary_text: length just outside off. Sudharsan comes forward and taps it gently towards mid on
header: Archer to B Sai Sudharsan, no run

commentary_text: Archer to B Sai Sudharsan, 1 runback of a length on off. Sudharsan bunts it to mid on and ambles across to the other end
header: Archer to B Sai Sudharsan,  1 run

commentary_text: first boundary for Kushagra! And it is an elegant stroke too. Full outside off. He leans forward and threads it between extra cover and mid off!
header: Archer to Kushagra, FOUR runs

commentary_text: fullish outside off. Kushagra gets another good stride in before pushing it to mid off
header: Archer to Kushagra, no run

commentary_text: Archer to Kushagra, 1 runshortish outside off. Kushagra rides the bounce and runs it down to deep third
header: Archer to Kushagra,  1 run

commentary_text: shot! Short and laced with width, and Sudharsan does not miss out. He latches onto it and slashes it over backward point!
header: Archer to B Sai Sudharsan, FOUR runs

commentary_text: Sandeep to Kushagra, 2 runsoff-pace on a back of a length just outside off. Kushagra waits on it before tugging it past mid wicket for a couple of runs
header: Sandeep to Kushagra,  2 runs

commentary_text: four more! Another error in line. On a back of a length on the pads and Kushagra glances it neatly to short fine leg's left!
header: Sandeep to Kushagra, FOUR runs

commentary_text: Sandeep to Kushagra, 1 runfullish on middle and off. Driven down the ground to long on
header: Sandeep to Kushagra,  1 run

commentary_text: length outside off. Sudharan gets onto the front foot and jabs it towards cover point
header: Sandeep to B Sai Sudharsan, no run

commentary_text: slower ball on a back of a length outside off. Sudharsan hangs back and stabs it to mid wicket
header: Sandeep to B Sai Sudharsan, no run

commentary_text: Sandeep to B Sai Sudharsan, 1 runangled in full on the stumps. Sudharsan drills it down the ground and nearly takes out his partner at the other end
header: Sandeep to B Sai Sudharsan,  1 run

commentary_text: bursts through the hands! Low full toss outside off. Sudharsan, with an open bat face, jams it into the turf and it is too hot to handle for Burger at short third!
header: Deshpande to B Sai Sudharsan, FOUR runs

commentary_text: back of a length outside off and this skids through. Sudharsan shapes up for the back-foot punch but is late on the stroke
header: Deshpande to B Sai Sudharsan, no run

commentary_text: shortish on leg and this hurries onto Sudharsan too. He cannot get much purchase on his pull and the ball pops up off the thigh pad towards the keeper
header: Deshpande to B Sai Sudharsan, no run

commentary_text: into the blockhole just outside off. Sudharsan cannot jam his bat down in time and that is three false strokes in as many balls
header: Deshpande to B Sai Sudharsan, no run

commentary_text: off-pace on a back of a length on middle and off. Sudharsan has a hack at it and does not make contact yet again
header: Deshpande to B Sai Sudharsan, no run

commentary_text: Deshpande to B Sai Sudharsan, 1 runlow full toss on the pads. Sudharsan tucks it off his toes towards deep square leg and keeps strike
header: Deshpande to B Sai Sudharsan,  1 run

commentary_text: Sandeep to B Sai Sudharsan, 2 runsanother misfield! Full toss outside off. Sudharsan flays it towards backward point, who fumbles and allows a couple of runs
header: Sandeep to B Sai Sudharsan,  2 runs

commentary_text: low full toss on the pads and punished this time! Rolls his wrists nicely, uses the angle and clips it beautifully past mid wicket!
header: Sandeep to B Sai Sudharsan, FOUR runs

commentary_text: Sandeep to B Sai Sudharsan, 1 runback of a length on off. Sudharsan lets the ball come to him before turning it towards deep square leg
header: Sandeep to B Sai Sudharsan,  1 run

commentary_text: authoritative! Slower ball into the track outside off. Kushagra picks the knuckle-ball, dances down and bangs it over the bowler's head!
header: Sandeep to Kushagra, FOUR runs

commentary_text: pace-on and bashed in short on middle and off. Kushagra looks to upper-cut it but does not get any purchase on it
header: Sandeep to Kushagra, no run

commentary_text: brilliant yorker on leg. Kushagra plays all around it and gets pinged on the boot. Might have been sliding down leg, though
header: Sandeep to Kushagra, no run

commentary_text: smart batting! Fired in on a back of a length outside off. Sudharsan opens his bat face late and uses Jadeja's pace to glide it fine past the keeper!
header: Jadeja to B Sai Sudharsan, FOUR runs

commentary_text: Jadeja to B Sai Sudharsan, 2 runspushed in on a length on the stumps. Sudharsan dinks it perfectly between deep mid wicket and deep square, and hurtles back for two
header: Jadeja to B Sai Sudharsan,  2 runs

commentary_text: Jadeja to B Sai Sudharsan, 2 runsdragged down outside off. Sudharsan hangs back and hacks it to long on's left. Back for another brace
header: Jadeja to B Sai Sudharsan,  2 runs

commentary_text: Jadeja to B Sai Sudharsan, 1 runon the shorter side again, outside off. Sudharsan hops back and tugs it to deep mid wicket
header: Jadeja to B Sai Sudharsan,  1 run

commentary_text: Jadeja to Kushagra, 1 runback of a length on off. Punched uppishly towards long off
header: Jadeja to Kushagra,  1 run

commentary_text: Jadeja to B Sai Sudharsan, 1 runlength outside off. Sudharsan turns it towards deep mid wicket and retains strike
header: Jadeja to B Sai Sudharsan,  1 run

commentary_text: welcomed with a sublime shot! Tossed up full just outside off. Sudharsan gives himself a bit of room and caresses it between extra cover and long off!
header: Parag to B Sai Sudharsan, FOUR runs

commentary_text: flighted up on a length just outside off. Sudharsan has a tentative prod at it and chunks it off the inside edge into the on side
header: Parag to B Sai Sudharsan, no run

commentary_text: seems a little slower, on a full length on middle and leg. Sudharsan shapes for the sweep and seems to get a scratch on it before getting rapped on the pad
header: Parag to B Sai Sudharsan, no run

commentary_text: Parag to B Sai Sudharsan, SIX runsSudharsan brings up his 13th IPL half-century in pristine fashion! This is a hit-me ball. Full toss outside off and Sudharsan mauls it over cow corner!
header: Parag to B Sai Sudharsan,  SIX runs

commentary_text: Parag to B Sai Sudharsan, 1 runback of a length on the stumps. Nudged off the back foot towards deep mid wicket
header: Parag to B Sai Sudharsan,  1 run

commentary_text: and Parag's event-filled over ends with a wicket! Lobbed up on a length on off. Kushagra gets down on one knee and swings at it with all his might. Gets more height than distance and Hetmyer, stood right on the fence, seems to take it before doing the juggling act and completing the catch. Third umpire pressed into action to see if all is good, and that is indeed the case. GT's opening partnership broken!Kumar Kushagra c Hetmyer b Parag 18 (14b 3x4 0x6 36m) SR: 128.57
header: Parag to Kushagra, OUT

commentary_text: Jadeja to B Sai Sudharsan, 1 runback of a length outside off. Sudharsan bunts it into the vacant mid wicket region
header: Jadeja to B Sai Sudharsan,  1 run

commentary_text: Jadeja to Buttler, 1 runflighted up full on off. Buttler comes forward and knocks it to long off to open his account
header: Jadeja to Buttler,  1 run

commentary_text: short, wide and put away! Ample width on offer and Sudharsan, by getting his hands through the ball, crashes it into the deep point fence!
header: Jadeja to B Sai Sudharsan, FOUR runs

commentary_text: Jadeja to B Sai Sudharsan, 2 runsback of a length outside off. Sudharsan hops back and punches it to long on
header: Jadeja to B Sai Sudharsan,  2 runs

commentary_text: Jadeja to B Sai Sudharsan, SIX runsthis is a mighty hit! Fired into the slot outside off and no half-measures from Sudharsan. He drops down to one knee and mauls it over deep mid wicket!
header: Jadeja to B Sai Sudharsan,  SIX runs

commentary_text: back of a length outside off. Sudharsan hangs back and dabs it towards backward point
header: Jadeja to B Sai Sudharsan, no run

commentary_text: shortish on the hips. Buttler a little late on the flick and the ball rolls off his thigh pad behind square
header: Burger to Buttler, 1 leg bye

commentary_text: Burger to B Sai Sudharsan, 1 runshort and wide outside off. Sudharsan jumps out to reach it and slaps it towards mid off. Good stop by Parag to his right
header: Burger to B Sai Sudharsan,  1 run

commentary_text: this is a Buttler classic! Length ball in the channel. Buttler stays on top of the bounce and lets his hands do all the work. Creams it on the up between mid off and extra cover!
header: Burger to Buttler, FOUR runs

commentary_text: back of a length outside off. Buttler opens his bat face and dabs it straight to backward point
header: Burger to Buttler, no run

commentary_text: Burger to Buttler, 1 runbanged in short outside off. Comes off slower than Buttler expects and he drags it towards deep backward square leg
header: Burger to Buttler,  1 run

commentary_text: clever, clever batting! Bashed half-way down but Sudharsan knows it is coming. He stays leg side of the ball, arches his back to get the elevation and ramps it over the keeper!
header: Burger to B Sai Sudharsan, FOUR runs

commentary_text: Ravi Bishnoi to Buttler, 1 rungoogly on a back of a length on off. Buttler hangs back and tugs it on the bounce to long on
header: Ravi Bishnoi to Buttler,  1 run

commentary_text: googly on a back of a length and this finishes a touch outside off, Sudharsan short-arm-jabs it to deep mid wicket and the siren goes off because Bishnoi has cut the return crease...
header: Ravi Bishnoi to B Sai Sudharsan, (no ball) 1 run

commentary_text: Ravi Bishnoi to Buttler, 1 runthrows it up on a length wide outside off, perhaps after sensing the charge. Buttler manages to reach it but chops it off the under-edge past the keeper
header: Ravi Bishnoi to Buttler,  1 run

commentary_text: googly on a back of a length outside off. Prodded out towards extra cover
header: Ravi Bishnoi to B Sai Sudharsan, no run

commentary_text: shanked and taken! Big, big moment in the game! Not the best ball Bishnoi will ever bowl but he will take it. Of course he will. A bit of a drag-down on middle and leg. Sudharsan shapes up for the mighty swipe over deep mid wicket but skews it straight down Deshpande's throat at deep backward square leg instead. Just the opening RR were craving!Sai Sudharsan c Deshpande b Ravi Bishnoi 73 (44b 9x4 3x6 53m) SR: 165.9
header: Ravi Bishnoi to B Sai Sudharsan, OUT

commentary_text: Ravi Bishnoi to Phillips, 1 runback of a length on off. Phillips hangs back and punches it to long on
header: Ravi Bishnoi to Phillips,  1 run

commentary_text: shot! Too short, too wide and that is enough for Buttler. He uses the pace, focuses on timing and cracks it through point!
header: Ravi Bishnoi to Buttler, FOUR runs

commentary_text: Deshpande to Phillips, 1 runback of a length outside off. Phillips jabs it enough to extra cover's left and picks up a single
header: Deshpande to Phillips,  1 run

commentary_text: this is Buttler at his best! Back of a length outside off. Buttler reads Deshpande's mind like a mentalist and moves across his stumps to lap it over the keeper!
header: Deshpande to Buttler, FOUR runs

commentary_text: Deshpande to Buttler, 1 runback of a length outside off. Buttler stays on top of the bounce and punches it towards deep point
header: Deshpande to Buttler,  1 run

commentary_text: Deshpande to Phillips, 1 runbanged in shorter outside off. Phillips jumps up onto his toes and jabs it towards deep point
header: Deshpande to Phillips,  1 run

commentary_text: Buttler in full flow now! Length outside off. Buttler transfers his weight forward, goes through the line and pops it over extra cover!
header: Deshpande to Buttler, FOUR runs

commentary_text: third boundary in the over, 15 off the 12th, and Buttler is rattling along now! This is a half-tracker outside off. Buttler rocks back and hammers it to deep mid wicket's right!
header: Deshpande to Buttler, FOUR runs

commentary_text: goneski, and Bishnoi is weaving his magic in Ahmedabad! Googly on a back of a length on off. Phillips wants to muscle this downtown but the inward angle means he cannot fully free his arms. Chips it towards long on and Archer hurtles in off the line, lunging forward to send Phillips on his way. GT pegged back yet again!Glenn Phillips c Archer b Ravi Bishnoi 3 (4b 0x4 0x6 7m) SR: 75
header: Ravi Bishnoi to Phillips, OUT

commentary_text: well, that is one way to announce yourself! Floated up full just outside off. Sundar stretches forward and bangs it over the bowler's head!
header: Ravi Bishnoi to Sundar, FOUR runs

commentary_text: four and out, and GT are throwing this away! This is full and on the pads. There to be hit, but perhaps along the ground. Sundar tries to get under it but the lack of room means he does not do so adequately. Plinked straight to deep mid wicket, and this GT chase is wobbling now!Washington Sundar c Jadeja b Ravi Bishnoi 4 (2b 1x4 0x6 1m) SR: 200
header: Ravi Bishnoi to Sundar, OUT

commentary_text: googly on a length outside off. Tewatia comes forward and defends with an open bat face
header: Ravi Bishnoi to Tewatia, no run

commentary_text: Ravi Bishnoi to Tewatia, 1 runshort and wide outside off. Tewatia has a waft at it and slices it towards deep backward point
header: Ravi Bishnoi to Tewatia,  1 run

commentary_text: Ravi Bishnoi to Buttler, 1 runback of a length on middle and leg. Buttler tucks it off his hips towards deep mid wicket
header: Ravi Bishnoi to Buttler,  1 run

commentary_text: top-edged to fine leg, and Buttler bites the dust too! The Titans are crumbling now! Banged in short outside off and this hurries onto Buttler. Gets big on him too, especially from around the wicket and Buttler cannot control his pull. Tame top edge to Sandeep, and he does the rest at fine leg. RR in control now!Jos Buttler c Sandeep Sharma b Burger 26 (14b 5x4 0x6 27m) SR: 185.71
header: Burger to Buttler, OUT

commentary_text: Burger to Shahrukh Khan, 1 runback of a length on the stumps. Shahrukh turns it into the on side to open his account
header: Burger to Shahrukh Khan,  1 run

commentary_text: Burger to Tewatia, 1 runback of a length outside off. Tewatia drops it into the extra cover region and hares across to the other end
header: Burger to Tewatia,  1 run

commentary_text: Burger to Shahrukh Khan, SIX runspick the bones out of that one! Half-tracker outside off and this sits up just the way Shahrukh wants it to. He loads up and clatters it over deep mid wicket!
header: Burger to Shahrukh Khan,  SIX runs

commentary_text: slower ball on a length outside off. Shahrukh comes forward and prods it towards extra cover
header: Burger to Shahrukh Khan, no run

commentary_text: nicely done! Banged in short on middle and leg. Shahrukh gives himself just enough room and ramps it wonderfully over the keeper!
header: Burger to Shahrukh Khan, FOUR runs

commentary_text: nicked and four! Googly on a length on middle and off. Tewatia tries to play a bit of French cricket and the ball bobbles off the outside edge past short third!
header: Ravi Bishnoi to Tewatia, FOUR runs

commentary_text: Ravi Bishnoi to Tewatia, SIX runsthis is a thumping blow! Back of a length on middle and leg. Tewatia sits down on the reverse and nails it over short third!
header: Ravi Bishnoi to Tewatia,  SIX runs

commentary_text: Bishnoi has the final word, and he is ripping through this Titans batting unit! Googly on a back of a length outside off. Tewatia tries to carve it behind point but the over-spin on this delivery means the ball kisses the top edge before nestling into Jurel's gloves. Sharp take, it must be said, and this is another body blow to GT's hopes!Rahul Tewatia c †Jurel b Ravi Bishnoi 12 (6b 1x4 1x6 11m) SR: 200
header: Ravi Bishnoi to Tewatia, OUT

commentary_text: through everyone and everything! Fizzing googly, pitching on a back of a length outside off. Zips in and Rashid is cut in half. Keeper cannot get to it either, and that was not far away from the stumps. Given as runs, interestingly!
header: Ravi Bishnoi to Rashid Khan, FOUR runs

commentary_text: oh dear lord - what are the Titans doing?! This is an implosion and then some! Hung up full and wide. Rashid cracks it past extra cover. The two is on but Shahrukh thinks the third might be as well. Not the wisest of calls ot take on Jadeja, though. Not this season. Not in any season. Shahrukh has to scramble to the batter's end and is still well short. Jadeja with a moment of customary fielding magic, and GT are reeling now!M Shahrukh Khan run out (Jadeja/†Jurel) 11 (4b 1x4 1x6 9m) SR: 275
header: Ravi Bishnoi to Rashid Khan, 2 runs, OUT

commentary_text: another close shave! Bishnoi has the ball on a string today. Another ripping googly, pitching on a length on leg and ragging past the outside edge, and also past off stump!
header: Ravi Bishnoi to Rabada, no run

commentary_text: Archer to Rashid Khan, 1 runfull outside off. Rashid sits deep in his crease and drills it towards sweeper cover
header: Archer to Rashid Khan,  1 run

commentary_text: Archer to Rabada, 1 runinto the blockhole on middle and leg. Rabada jams it out towards extra cover and picks up a single
header: Archer to Rabada,  1 run

commentary_text: Archer to Rashid Khan, 1 runfull toss on middle and leg. Rashid opens his bat face and squeezes it past backward point
header: Archer to Rashid Khan,  1 run

commentary_text: Archer to Rabada, SIX runspressure? What pressure, asks Rabada?! Back of a length on off. Rabada gives himself ample room and slams it mid off!
header: Archer to Rabada,  SIX runs

commentary_text: Archer to Rabada, 1 runfull toss on middle and off. Rabada stabs it towards mid off and picks up another single
header: Archer to Rabada,  1 run

commentary_text: back of a length on middle and off. Rashid hangs back and in a cramped motion, tugs it towards mid wicket
header: Archer to Rashid Khan, no run

commentary_text: Ravi Bishnoi to Rabada, 1 rungoogly on a back of a length just outside off. Rabada goes back and knocks it to long on
header: Ravi Bishnoi to Rabada,  1 run

commentary_text: four more - the runs are flowing now! A leg-spinner but dragged down outside off. Rashid rocks back and scythes it just behind point!
header: Ravi Bishnoi to Rashid Khan, FOUR runs

commentary_text: Ravi Bishnoi to Rashid Khan, 1 rungoogly on a fullish length outside off. Rashid drops it into the off side and takes a single. Smart batting
header: Ravi Bishnoi to Rashid Khan,  1 run

commentary_text: googly on a length just outside off. Rabada, caught on the crease, goes feeling for it and sees the ball sneak past the outside edge
header: Ravi Bishnoi to Rabada, no run

commentary_text: leg-spinner fizzed through on a length on off. Rabada stays back and prods it into the off side
header: Ravi Bishnoi to Rabada, no run

commentary_text: clean as a whistle! Flighted up into the slot on middle and off. Rabada channels his inner Brian Lara and launches it over the bowler's head!
header: Ravi Bishnoi to Rabada, FOUR runs

commentary_text: oh, this is beautiful batting! Very full outside off. Rashid steps down, opens his bat face and steers it between backward point and short third!
header: Sandeep to Rashid Khan, FOUR runs

commentary_text: Sandeep to Rashid Khan, 1 runleg-cutter on a length on off. Rashid dabs it towards backward point
header: Sandeep to Rashid Khan,  1 run

commentary_text: Sandeep to Rabada, SIX runsKagiso Rabada, you absolute champion! This is hitting of the highest order, and hitting when the pressure is on. Slower ball on a length outside off. Rabada works out the angle from around the wicket and smokes it into the sightscreen!
header: Sandeep to Rabada,  SIX runs

commentary_text: Sandeep to Rabada, 1 runlow full toss wide outside off. Rabada throws his hands at it and slices it towards deep point
header: Sandeep to Rabada,  1 run

commentary_text: Sandeep to Rashid Khan, 2 runsinto the blockhole on the pads. Rashid tucks it off his toes towards deep backward square leg. Rashid takes on Jadeja's arm again and he makes it!
header: Sandeep to Rashid Khan,  2 runs

commentary_text: Sandeep to Rashid Khan, 1 runanother top yorker on middle and off. Rashid gives himself a bit of room and clinks it out into the off side
header: Sandeep to Rashid Khan,  1 run

commentary_text: Archer to Rashid Khan, 1 runlength outside off. Rashid tries to smash it into next week and chunks it off the inside edge into his pads
header: Archer to Rashid Khan,  1 run

commentary_text: sharp bumper, tucking up the batter on leg. Rabada has to work against the angle from around the wicket too and gets tagged on the body
header: Archer to Rabada, no run

commentary_text: Archer to Rabada, 1 rundug in short on leg. Rabada cramped for room on the pull again and tugs it towards deep mid wicket
header: Archer to Rabada,  1 run

commentary_text: Archer to Rashid Khan, 1 runbig, big lbw shout, and Archer wants the review. And he gets the review too! Zipped in full on middle stump. Rashid sits deep in his crease and seems to get a scratch on it before getting pinged on the back leg. Rashid thinks there is an inside edge, and the umpire's call is vindicated. UltraEdge confirms bat is involved, and Rashid stays!
header: Archer to Rashid Khan,  1 run

commentary_text: into the blockhole on middle and leg. Rabada jams it back to the bowler, who gets his hands to it to his right. Vital dot ball
header: Archer to Rabada, no run

commentary_text: high full toss outside off. Rabada backs away and throws the kitchen sink at it. Misses it completely and the keeper fumbles too, allowing a bye. But hang on, there could be more drama in this still. Rabada wants to review, arguing this is above the waist. Not sure he has a case here, though. Seems to be below the waist in real-time, and Ball Tracking confirms those suspicions. 21cm below the waist, and that will be just a bye!
header: Archer to Rabada, 1 bye

commentary_text: Deshpande starts with a wayward delivery. A full toss a mile outside off and once Rabada swings like a rusty gate and misses, the umpire calls it a wide
header: Deshpande to Rabada, 1 wide

commentary_text: Deshpande to Rabada, 1 runlow full toss outside off. Rabada sits deep in his crease and squeezes it out towards sweeper cover
header: Deshpande to Rabada,  1 run

commentary_text: Deshpande to Rashid Khan, 1 runexcellent yorker on middle and off. Rashid opens his bat face and digs it out towards deep third. Just a single, and this is getting tougher for GT now!
header: Deshpande to Rashid Khan,  1 run

commentary_text: Deshpande to Rabada, 1 runthis is superb bowling. Another yorker outside off and Rabada can only clonk it back to the bowler, who gets his right hand to it but cannot quite prevent the single
header: Deshpande to Rabada,  1 run

commentary_text: oh my! Deshpande sticks to his guns, and Rashid cannot get his scoop away. Tries to shuffle across to this very full ball outside off and gets nutmegged for his troubles!
header: Deshpande to Rashid Khan, no run

commentary_text: sliced out to the fence, and Archer snares the chance! Deshpande is having the night of his life under the Ahmedabad lights! On a length and hung up wide outside off. Rashid throws the plumbing at it but he slices it way too much. Off the outer half and Archer, prowling on the deep point fence, rattles to his right to gobble it up. Parag is pumped. Deshpande is pumped. GT on the ropes one final time perhaps!Rashid Khan c Archer b Deshpande 24 (16b 3x4 0x6 32m) SR: 150
header: Deshpande to Rashid Khan, OUT

commentary_text: and Deshpande has won a thriller for the Royals! Deshpande thumps his chest in pure victory elation and then does the gesture showing everyone around the country and the world that this is his stage. What a game, and what a finishing act by Deshpande! Full toss speared into the stumps. There to be hit but with the pressure on his shoulders, Ashok shanks it off the inside edge into his body. The ball rolls away harmlessly behind square and now, cue the wild celebrations. RR have pulled this one out of the fire, and Deshpande has been front and centre of GT's hopes being extinguished!
header: Deshpande to Ashok Sharma, no run
